debug_info.goal:
α : Type
inst✝ : LinearOrder α
l : List α
x : α
⊢ List.count x l = List.count x (quickSort α inst✝ l)

proof:
cases l with
  | nil => simp
  | cons pivot l =>
    have hs : (smaller pivot l).length < (pivot :: l).length := by grind
    have hl : (larger pivot l).length < (pivot :: l).length := by grind
    have ih₁ := count_eq_count_quickSort (smaller pivot l) x
    have ih₂ := count_eq_count_quickSort (larger pivot l) x
    have h := count_sum_above_below_pivot pivot l x
    simp only [quickSort_cons, List.count_append, List.count_cons, ← ih₁, ← ih₂, h]
    omega
termination_by l.length
successful_attempts:
cases l with
  | nil => simp
  | cons pivot l =>
    have hs : (smaller pivot l).length < (pivot :: l).length := by grind
    have hl : (larger pivot l).length < (pivot :: l).length := by grind
    have ih₁ := count_eq_count_quickSort (smaller pivot l) x
    have ih₂ := count_eq_count_quickSort (larger pivot l) x
    have h := count_sum_above_below_pivot pivot l x
    simp only [quickSort_cons, List.count_append, List.count_cons, ← ih₁, ← ih₂, h]
    omega
termination_by l.length
